url.description: Novel page URL containing novelid parameter.
url.title: Url

token.description: Jjwxc App user token. Required for paid (locked) chapters.
token.title: Token

output_dir.description: Directory to save output files. Defaults to a temp folder (tempfile.gettempdir()/jjwxc_downloads). In production, always set this explicitly.
output_dir.title: Output Dir

state.description: Chinese character conversion: '' = none, 's' = traditional→simplified, 't' = simplified→traditional.
state.title: State

thread_num.description: Number of concurrent download threads. Recommended: 50–200.
thread_num.title: Thread Num

chapter_start.description: First chapter to download (1-indexed). 0 means start from chapter 1.
chapter_start.title: Chapter Start

chapter_end.description: Last chapter to download (inclusive). 0 means download to the last chapter.
chapter_end.title: Chapter End

save_per_chapter.description: TXT only. True = save each chapter as a separate file; False = merge into one file.
save_per_chapter.title: Save Per Chapter

remove_blank_lines.description: TXT only. Remove blank lines between paragraphs.
remove_blank_lines.title: Remove Blank Lines

show_number.description: Include chapter ID number in the chapter heading.
show_number.title: Show Number

show_title.description: Include chapter title text in the chapter heading.
show_title.title: Show Title

show_summary.description: Include chapter summary in the chapter heading.
show_summary.title: Show Summary

show_chinfo.description: Prepend word count and update date at the start of each chapter.
show_chinfo.title: Show Chinfo

del_thanks.description: Strip boilerplate 'thank you for the nutrient solution / landmine' lines from author's notes.
del_thanks.title: Del Thanks

add_cover.description: EPUB only. Download and embed the cover image.
add_cover.title: Add Cover

html_vol.description: EPUB2 only. Render volume titles as standalone HTML pages.
html_vol.title: Html Vol

special_intro.description: Use the web-page version of the novel synopsis (preserves original HTML layout). Default uses plain-text API synopsis.
special_intro.title: Special Intro

custom_title.description: Custom chapter heading template. Variables: $1 = chapter ID, $2 = title, $3 = summary. Empty = use default.
custom_title.title: Custom Title

custom_vol.description: Custom volume title template. Variables: $1 = volume index, $2 = volume name. Empty = default '§ name §'.
custom_vol.title: Custom Vol

css_text.description: EPUB only. Custom CSS string embedded in the EPUB stylesheet.
css_text.title: Css Text

validate_only.description: If True, verify that the URL is reachable and the token is valid (by fetching novel info) without performing the actual download. Returns success=True and output_file='' if validation passes.
validate_only.title: Validate Only
